articles.title: Solving the AI Cost Crisis
articles.deck: Gartner forecasts 40% of agentic AI projects will be cancelled by 2027. Not because the models aren’t capable, but because the economics don’t hold. Here’s the routing pattern I keep returning to.

articles.title: Cutting Three Months from Discovery
articles.deck: How prototype-driven discovery compressed a healthcare billing build by a quarter, and what I’d do differently next time.
